actions.leaf_title: Extend CLI router to support temperature domain

revised.title: Extend CLI router for temperature with message assertions updated
revised.content:
Previous attempt changed the unknown-domain error wording but left the old assertion in its own test. Route the temperature domain AND update the message assertions atomically.

Files: unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_router.py

Acceptance criteria:
- temperature routes to the affine module
- tests/test_router.py::test_unknown_domain_message passes with the new wording

Test expectations: router tests updated in the same diff as the message change

actions.rationale: The failure is self-inflicted test drift; respec pins message + assertion to one diff.

leaf.title: Preserve fractional degrees in temperature conversions
leaf.content:
Confirmed finding: conversions round to int, losing fractional degrees. Return floats end-to-end; format only at the CLI edge.

Files: unitconv/temperature.py, tests/test_temperature.py

Acceptance criteria:
- convert(37.5,'C','F') == 99.5 exactly
- CLI prints one decimal place by default

Test expectations: anchor tests for fractional inputs in tests/test_temperature.py
